codeact.thought: Multiply 12 and 3 to get 36 — a large number that can be reduced with 1 and 5.
codeact.code:
numbers = [1, 3, 5, 12]
res = numbers[3] * numbers[1]   # 12 * 3 = 36
remaining = [numbers[0], numbers[2]]
new_numbers = [res] + remaining
print(new_numbers)
